cve.title: Critical OpenSSL vulnerability allows remote code execution
cve.contentSnippet: A heap overflow in the certificate parsing routine could let an attacker execute arbitrary code. Patches are available; upgrade immediately.

cve.title: Privilege escalation flaw disclosed in widely used logging library
cve.contentSnippet: Improper input validation allows local users to gain elevated privileges. CVSS 8.1. Mitigations and a fixed release have been published.

cve.title: Actively exploited zero-day added to the Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog
cve.contentSnippet: Federal agencies are directed to remediate within the due date. Evidence of active exploitation in the wild has been confirmed.

cloud.title: Docker Engine release hardens default container isolation
cloud.contentSnippet: The latest engine improves rootless mode defaults and tightens seccomp profiles to reduce the container attack surface.

cloud.title: New KVM features improve nested virtualization performance
cloud.contentSnippet: Upstream changes reduce VM-exit overhead for nested guests, benefiting CI runners and cloud-in-cloud workloads.

cloud.title: Kubernetes patch release fixes API server denial-of-service
cloud.contentSnippet: Maintainers recommend upgrading clusters to the patched minor versions to address a resource-exhaustion issue.

system.title: Linux kernel stable release lands with scheduler and io_uring fixes
system.contentSnippet: The new stable point release includes backported fixes across the scheduler, networking and the io_uring subsystem.

system.title: systemd adds tighter sandboxing options for system services
system.contentSnippet: New unit directives make it easier to confine daemons with namespaces and restricted syscall sets by default.

system.title: Filesystem maintainers discuss next-gen snapshot tooling
system.contentSnippet: A summary of the latest discussion on copy-on-write filesystems, snapshots and long-term maintenance burdens.
